parameters.query: SELECT MAX(synced_at) AS last_sync FROM wms.wms_items_cache WHERE company_code = $1

SET NOCOUNT ON;
SELECT T0.ItemCode, T0.ItemName, T0.InvntryUom, T0.ManBtchNum, T0.UpdateDate,
       ISNULL(T0.FrgnName, '') AS ForeignName,
       ISNULL(T0.ItmsGrpCod, 0) AS ItemGroup,
       ISNULL(T0.BuyUnitMsr, '') AS PurchaseUom,
       ISNULL(T0.SalUnitMsr, '') AS SellUom,
       CASE WHEN T0.frozenFor = 'Y' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS IsActive
FROM OITM T0 WITH (NOLOCK)
WHERE (T0.UpdateDate > '{{ $json.last_date }}' OR T0.CreateDate > '{{ $json.last_date }}')
ORDER BY T0.UpdateDate ASC

parameters.jsCode: return { json: { success: true, count: 0, message: '物料缓存: 无需更新' } };
